name: The Notorious B.I.G.
bio: The Notorious B.I.G. has a durable catalog that continues to attract listeners through streaming, playlists, and long-tail discovery.
notable_for: The Notorious B.I.G. remains closely associated with Juicy and Big Poppa, which continue to anchor catalog attention.
career_highlight: Songs like Juicy and Big Poppa still help define the catalog's long-tail earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming sustains earnings even after the original release cycle ends.
Playlist use and listener rediscovery keep durable songs in circulation.
Licensing and long-tail audience demand help extend catalog value over time.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps The Notorious B.I.G.'s current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: The Notorious B.I.G.'s page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
